results.title: Suneel S
highlights:
Senior AI Data Scientist | LLMs | GPT | RAG | CoPilot | LangGraph | Transformers | LangChain | LangGraph | Python | NLP | Vector Databases | Azure ML | AWS SageMaker | Databricks | Spark | MLflow | Docker | FastAPI
...
Senior Data Scientist at [Northern Trust](https://www.linkedin.com/company/northern-trust)
...
I’m a Senior AI & ML Data Scientist with 12+ years of experience building real-world AI systems that make a measurable impact in Banking, Healthcare, Retail, and Financial Services. Over the years, my work has naturally evolved across four major areas: Data Science, ML Engineering, AI Engineering, and most recently, LLM and RAG development. I love solving complex problems end-to-end—starting from raw data, understanding the business challenge, designing the right models, and finally deploying solutions that run reliably in production. My background includes everything from classical ML (XGBoost, Random Forests, time-series forecasting) to deep learning and transformer-based NLP for sentiment analysis, summarization, fraud detection, and customer analytics. On the engineering side, I enjoy building strong foundations: data pipelines, feature workflows, and production systems using Python, SQL, Spark, Databricks, Airflow, Snowflake, MLflow, and cloud-native services across AWS, Azure, and GCP. I’ve deployed models through FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD with a focus on observability, model drift, and long-term maintainability. In recent years, a big part of my work has centered around Large Language Models. I build and fine-tune LLMs using GPT, BERT, T5, LoRA, QLoRA, and adapter-based approaches. I design RAG systems using vector databases like FAISS, Milvus, and Chroma, and work on distributed training with DeepSpeed, Megatron-LM, and GPU-accelerated inference. This includes building guardrails, prompt frameworks, hybrid retrieval, and monitoring for safe, reliable LLM behavior. I enjoy collaborating with cross-functional teams, breaking down technical concepts for business partners, and turning ideas into AI products that actually get used. My goal is always the same: create solutions that are practical, scalable, and aligned with real business value—while staying curious and continuously learning what’s next in the world of ML and generative AI.
...
### Senior Data Scientist at [Northern Trust](https://www.linkedin.com/company/northern-trust) (Current)
...
I engineered advanced AI and ML solutions across marketing analytics, forecasting, NLP, and enterprise LLM applications. Leveraging ARIMA/SARIMA, XGBoost, Random Forests, and transformer-based models, I built predictive pipelines that supported sales planning, budgeting, and scenario-based decision-making. I designed production-grade RAG systems using FAISS/Milvus, ANN search, and optimized embedding stores, while also deploying GPT-based chatbots and sentiment analysis workflows for customer-focused use cases. I implemented distributed LLM training and inference with Megatron-LM and DeepSpeed, using tensor parallelism, ZeRO optimization, beam search, and QAT for scalable low-latency deployment. I automated ETL processes with Python and Airflow, integrated SQL/data-lake pipelines, and instrumented monitoring layers for drift detection and model stability. Additionally, I built Tableau/Power BI dashboards for leadership insights and guided cross-functional delivery through JIRA, Confluence, and structured prompt-engineering frameworks.

My work primarily involved building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based multimodal chatbots tailored to client needs. I utilized various Azure AI services for these projects. We are looking for an Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President with a robust background in Generative AI, Machine Learning, enterprise architecture, cloud platforms, and scalable solution design. You will be responsible for designing and implementing AI-enabled solutions that are secure, resilient, compliant, and aligned with enterprise architecture standards. This role requires strong experience in translating business requirements into end-to-end AI solution architectures, including platform integration, governance, observability, and production readiness. The ideal candidate will work across business, engineering, security, data, and risk teams to deliver scalable and responsible AI solutions for enterprise use cases.
...
The team you will be joining plays a vital role in enabling enterprise AI adoption by building secure, scalable, and governance-aligned architecture for Generative AI and Machine Learning solutions. This role is important because it helps ensure AI solutions are designed for production readiness, compliance, interoperability, and long-term business value across the organization.
...
As an Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President, you will:
...
• Design end-to-end AI/ML and Generative AI solution architectures for enterprise use cases, including model integration, orchestration, APIs, data flows, and downstream system interactions.

...

...

...

...

...

...

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: Financial Crimes Compliance Analyst | Hirenixa
highlights:
Financial Crimes Compliance Analyst |
...
# Financial Crimes Compliance Analyst
...
Remote, USA
...
Posted Jul 5, 2026
...
Full-time
...
Northern Trust, a Fortune 500 company, is a globally recognized financial institution that has been in operation since 1889. They are seeking a Financial Crimes Compliance Analyst to investigate potential financial crime incidents involving Northern Trust accounts, clients, or employees, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations and maintaining confidentiality throughout the process. Responsibilities Utilizes a transaction monitoring system to complete alerts to determine if further escalation is warranted to determine if suspicious activity was identified and a possible financial crime (fraud, money laundering, or terrorist financing) has occurred that involves Northern Trust accounts and clients Supports each alert investigation with appropriate analysis and documents investigation activities and conclusions Completes alerts within prescribed timeframes according to Northern Trust’s timing standards Interacts with partners or external parties in the course of alert investigations, as appropriate Recognizes the highly sensitive nature of investigation activities and maintains confidentiality Consults with management when necessary, regarding more complex or sensitive investigations Able to conduct open-source research, including searches in external and internal databases to facilitate discussions and reach decisions Ensures the timely screening, review, recordkeeping, and reporting of FinCEN’s 314(a) requests as prescribed by the regulation Ensure that operational 314(a) processing is completed, analyze the output of the 314a screening process, and make decisions on appropriate actions to take Review and screen 314(a) reports generated on clients and transactions to determine if there is a match Skills Strong analytical skills are required Excellent oral and written communication skills are required Knowledge of rules and regulations related to the Bank Security Act (BSA), USA Patriot Act, Anti-Money Laundering (AML), and 314(a) regulation Analytical and problem-solving skills are required Technical skills / knowledge of Northern Trust transaction processing systems is preferred A College or University degree and at least 1-4 years of relevant work experience is preferred Related Industry qualification (e.g., ACAMS, CFE) or studying towards, is preferred Benefits Retirement benefits (401k and pension) Health and welfare benefits (medical, dental, vision, spending accounts and disability) Paid time off Parental and caregiver leave Life & accident insurance Other voluntary and well-being benefits Discretionary bonus program that may include an equity component Company Overview Northern Trust is a global leader in delivering innovative investment management, asset and fund administration, fiduciary and banking. It was founded in 1889, and is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, USA, with a workforce of 10001+ employees. Its website is http://www.northerntrust.com. Company H1B Sponsorship Northern Trust has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 22 in 2026, 180 in 2025, 203 in 2024, 102 in 2023, 74 in 2022, 298 in 2021, 83 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

highlights:
Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director | Wfh
...
# Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director
...
About this role: Wells Fargo is seeking an Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director, as part of the Artificial Intelligence team. Learn more about career areas and lines of business at wellsfargojobs.com. The Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director leads the enterprise-wide AI vision and strategy by managing a comprehensive AI roadmap aligned to business priorities, shaping governance and responsible AI practices, and driving market‑informed innovation. This role oversees the development and scaling of advanced AI capabilities, including machine learning, NLP, RPA, predictive analytics, and generative AI, while ensuring strict standards for security, fairness, ethics, and risk management. You will build strong cross‑functional partnerships across technology, business, operations, and risk to influence senior leaders, secure alignment, and representing the AI organization in key executive and regulatory forums. You will lead a high‑performing team of AI professionals, foster a culture of innovation and continuous learning, manage people and budget resources, and ensure successful delivery of large‑scale AI initiatives that meet regulatory, operational, and strategic business objectives. In this role, you will: Manage and develop the overall Artificial Intelligence roadmap for the company Provide leadership, management and direction companywide on artificial intelligence initiatives Develop market strategies for the company Lead Artificial Intelligence team by making strategic decisions to resolve robotics process automation, natural language processing, and machine learning Understand the options in the market and educating companywide on these opportunities Collaborate and influence all levels of professionals, including more experienced managers Lead team to achieve objectives Manage allocation of people and financial resources for Artificial Intelligence Solutions Develop and guide a culture of talent development to meet business objectives and strategy
